---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem or need this feature addresses. Focus on the use case, not the solution.
     Example: "When I have 500 files in a folder, I have no way to quickly find the ones I need
     without triggering a full recursive search." -->

---

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your proposed solution. Be as specific as you can about UI, behavior, and interaction. -->

---

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches that could solve the same problem? -->

---

## Prior Art

<!-- Does any other file manager (Finder, Nautilus, Dolphin, Total Commander, etc.) already do
     something similar? A screenshot or description of how it works there is helpful. -->

---

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant context, mockups, or references. -->

---

> **Note:** Before implementing a large feature, please check [`ROADMAP.md`](https://github.com/conniecombs/SimpleFile-Svelte/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) and discuss in this
> issue first. This avoids duplication with planned work and ensures the approach fits the
> project architecture.
